indication: SPRYCEL is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive (Ph+) chronic myelogenous leukaemia (CML) in the chronic phase.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized dasatinib (anhydrous) for the treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive (Ph+) chronic myelogenous leukemia (CML) in the chronic phase.

document.name: Sprycel (dasatinib [anhydrous]) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Bristol-Myers Squibb Pharma EEIG. Sprycel (dasatinib [anhydrous]) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/sprycel-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised June 2022. Accessed March 22, 2024.
